title: Config panel cannot be brought back - Nightly 1.77.2
author: pauldurham
body_snippet:
Once the Config Panel has been closed I don't see a "View" option to bring it back.  Only a Layout Reset seems to bring it back.

## Expected Behavior
I expect to see a View option to enable the Config Panel.

## Current Behavior
Only a Layout Reset re-enables the Config Panel.

## Context
It makes changing the layout tricky.

## Your Environment
Windows 10 Enterprise 64-bit 20H2.

iterations.description: The configuration panel becomes inaccessible to the user, hindering usability.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The configuration panel becomes inaccessible to the user, hindering usability.
Approach: Investigate the lifecycle of FrmOptions, focusing on its closing and reopening behavior in FrmMain, to ensure it's either correctly shown if hidden, or a new instance is created and shown.
